title: 真实 provider release 包补验
command: uv run lj doctor --json && which ffmpeg && ffmpeg -version && ffprobe -version && sh -c ffmpeg -hide_banner -filters | grep drawtext && sh -c sw_vers 2>/dev/null || uname -a && uv run lj init projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --name 真实发布补验 --json && uv run lj ingest text projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --file examples/product_intro_zh.txt --json && uv run lj extract projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --json && uv run lj script projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --type product --platform douyin --language zh-CN --ratio 9:16 --duration 45 --provider claude_cli --json && uv run lj approve script projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --approved-by ci --json && uv run lj voice projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --provider kokoro_zh_tts --voice release-voice --json && uv run lj approve voice projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --approved-by ci --json && uv run lj visuals projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --engine ffmpeg_card --template product --json && uv run lj approve visuals projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --approved-by ci --json && uv run lj render projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --platform douyin --language zh-CN --ratio 9:16 --release --json && uv run lj qa projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --release --platform douyin --json && uv run lj export projects/verify_real_20260702T232732Z --platform douyin --language zh-CN --ratio 9:16 --release --json && ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_type,codec_name -of json exports/verify_real_20260702T232732Z/douyin/zh-CN/9x16/video.mp4
expect: doctor ready 后真实 release render/export/ffprobe 全链路通过
notes: doctor ready,真实 release 补验已执行并通过。

title: uv sync
command: uv sync

title: pytest 离线全集
command: uv run pytest

title: ruff
command: uv run ruff check .

title: doctor required 缺失退出非零
command: /usr/bin/env -u LINGJIAN_LLM_CLI -u LINGJIAN_TTS_CLI -u OPENAI_BASE_URL -u OPENAI_API_KEY -u OPENAI_MODEL -u OPENAI_TTS_BASE_URL -u OPENAI_TTS_API_KEY -u OPENAI_TTS_MODEL PATH=/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin /Users/manxiaochu/.local/bin/uv run lj doctor --json
expect: 无真实 provider 时返回非零并给 required

title: Web TypeScript
command: pnpm --dir apps/web lint

title: Web build
command: pnpm --dir apps/web build

title: Web smoke 截图
command: test -f output/playwright/web-smoke.png

title: 初始化项目

title: 文本输入

title: extract 路由
command: uv run lj extract projects/verify_m1_20260702T232732Z --json

title: 生成文案

title: 未审批 render 阻断
command: uv run lj render projects/verify_m1_20260702T232732Z --platform douyin --language zh-CN --ratio 9:16 --json

title: 审批文案
command: uv run lj approve script projects/verify_m1_20260702T232732Z --approved-by tester --json

title: 生成语音以完成三审基线
command: uv run lj voice projects/verify_m1_20260702T232732Z --provider mock --voice test-voice --json

command: uv run lj approve voice projects/verify_m1_20260702T232732Z --approved-by tester --json
